languages.text: "Чтобы не забыть свое естество. Я должен буду собрать себя заново, когда... если выберусь отсюда".
"So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."
languages.original_text: "Чтобы не забыть свое естество. Я должен буду собрать себя заново, когда... если выберусь отсюда".

traits.locale_text: "So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."
"So as not to forget what I am. I will have to assemble myself anew when... if I get out of here."
"So as not to forget what I am. I will have to reassemble myself when... if I get out of here."
"So as not to forget what I am. I will have to reassemble myself when... if I get out of here."
"So as not to forget what I am. I will have to reassemble myself when... if I get out of here."
"So as not to forget what I am. I will have to reassemble myself when... if I get out of here."
"So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."

languages.text: "Um nicht zu vergessen, was ich bin. Ich werde mich zusammenflicken müssen ... falls ich hier rauskomme."
languages.original_text: "So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."

traits.locale_text: "Um nicht zu vergessen, was ich bin. Ich werde mich zusammenflicken müssen ... falls ich hier rauskomme."

languages.text: « Pour ne pas oublier qui je suis. Il faudra que je recompose mon corps... une fois sorti d'ici. »
languages.original_text: "So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."

traits.locale_text: « Pour ne pas oublier qui je suis. Il faudra que je recompose mon corps... une fois sorti d'ici. »

languages.text: «Para no olvidar lo que soy. Tendré que volver a recomponer mis partes cuando... si salgo de aquí».
languages.original_text: "So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."

traits.locale_text: «Para no olvidar lo que soy. Tendré que volver a recomponer mis partes cuando... si salgo de aquí».

languages.text: "Ne olduğumu unutmamak için. Buradan çıkarsam... Çıktığımda kendimi birleştirmem gerekecek."
languages.original_text: "So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."

traits.locale_text: "Ne olduğumu unutmamak için. Buradan çıkarsam... Çıktığımda kendimi birleştirmem gerekecek."

languages.text: “为了不让我忘记自己是谁。等我出去后……如果我能从这里出去的话，我需要把自己重新组装起来。”
languages.original_text: "So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."

traits.locale_text: “为了不让我忘记自己是谁。等我出去后……如果我能从这里出去的话，我需要把自己重新组装起来。”

languages.text: 「自分が何者であるかを忘れぬためです。ここから出られたとき……いや、出られたならば、私は自らを継ぎ合わせて元に戻さねばなりませんから」
languages.original_text: "So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."

traits.locale_text: 「自分が何者であるかを忘れぬためです。ここから出られたとき……いや、出られたならば、私は自らを継ぎ合わせて元に戻さねばなりませんから」
